description: Producer/referee separation for evidence_mode. A producer hint is disclosure, not control flow. The referee derives evidence_mode from what it actually verified; the board displays the strongest claim that survives recomputation. producer_hint_contradicts_referee is a first-class cross_check finding.

vectors.description: Baseline: producer declares embedded_fixture; referee finds key material in header and recomputes successfully. Hint matches referee-derived mode. Board displays full claim.

board_result.evidence_contract: embedded_fixture: key in header, hash recomputable, signature input recomputable

vectors.description: Producer declares embedded_fixture. Referee cannot locate public_key_hash or key material in header — recomputation path is broken. Hint recorded as disclosure only; referee derives unverifiable mode. producer_hint_contradicts_referee is the cross_check finding. Claim falls to unverifiable.
vectors.failure_detail: Producer declared embedded_fixture but public_key_hash is absent and key material is not present in jws.header.jwk. The contract for embedded_fixture requires the key to be present and recomputable from the fixture alone. Referee cannot establish the recomputation path without out-of-band key fetch.

board_result.blocked_reason: key_material_absent: public_key_hash not present; embedded_fixture contract requires recomputable key in header
board_result.evidence_contract: embedded_fixture failed: key recomputation path broken

vectors.description: Producer declares pinned_registry. Referee finds no key_record_hash, registry_entry_hash, or resolution_time available. The contract for pinned_registry requires all three fields to be present and independently verifiable. Hint recorded as disclosure; referee derives registry_unverifiable. Row falls to admission_independent.
vectors.failure_detail: Producer declared pinned_registry but key_record_hash, registry_entry_hash, and resolution_time are all absent from the fixture. The pinned_registry contract requires the referee to independently verify the key against a recorded registry snapshot. Without resolution evidence, the referee cannot establish that the key was the one in use at admission time.

board_result.blocked_reason: pinned_registry contract unmet: key_record_hash, registry_entry_hash, resolution_time all absent
board_result.evidence_contract: pinned_registry failed: no resolution evidence available to referee
